_convention: Coords are WorldPlayerPos space (== overworld_catalog x/z). Ground plane axes +X and +Z. origin = floor-AABB min snapped down to a multiple of cell. col = floor((x-origin[0])/cell) indexes X; row = floor((z-origin[1])/cell) indexes Z. bit index = row*cols+col, MSB-first per byte, base64. bit==1 => WALKABLE.
